auth.loginSubtitle: We'll send a magic link to your email.
auth.linkSentBody: A sign-in link is on its way to {email}. It expires in 60 minutes.
auth.errorBody: We couldn't verify that magic link. It may have expired — please request a new one.

onboarding.title: Create your workspace
onboarding.subtitle: A workspace is where your team's security events, endpoints, and reports live.
onboarding.slugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. This can't be changed later.

workspace.emptyEventsBody: Install the CLI and run {command} on a developer machine to start streaming events.
workspace.emptyReportsBody: Generate your first compliance report from live evidence collected by the Guard.

device.title: Authorize CLI
device.subtitle: Enter the code shown in your terminal.
device.approveBody: A CLI session will be granted access to workspace {workspace} as {email}.
device.approved: Device approved. You can close this tab and return to the terminal.
